title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
